description: API lane with contract files -- combined verdict (pytest AND /contract-test).

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Agent detects openapi.yaml and invokes Skill(contract-test) after pytest
rubric_hints.output_structure: Lane contract includes both pytest verdict AND contract-test verdict
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#2 lane=api: combined exit code + contract-test; emits CONTRACT_BROKEN if drift
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Skill(contract-test) invoked once per lane invocation, after pytest
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Contract drift surfaces as CONTRACT_BROKEN in failures[]
